creator: sirdice@gmail.com
text:
Due to a security issue percona-toolkit was updated to 2.2.7. 

http://www.percona.com/doc/percona-toolkit/2.2/release_notes.html#v2-2-7-released-2014-02-20

Should be a relatively easy fix.

How-To-Repeat:
# make -C /usr/ports/databases/percona-toolkit install

Fix:
PORTVERSION= 2.2.6 -> 2.2.7
